shots.title: Numeric sort in loader.ts and review.ts
shots.notes: Replaced lexicographic .sort() with numeric comparator in loader.ts and review.ts. Added loader.test.ts with 6 tests covering numeric ordering, minSprint filter, and detectLatestSprint.

shots.title: Add --player flag to auto-card and ScorecardInput
shots.notes: Added player field to ScorecardInput interface, threaded through buildScorecard with conditional spread. Added --player to auto-card CLI usage and passthrough. 2 new builder tests for player field presence/absence.

shots.title: Thread reported_by in distill pipeline
shots.notes: Extract unique player/session_player from cluster events into reported_by on suggested patterns. Merge reported_by arrays (union, deduplicated) when updating existing patterns. 4 new pipeline tests.

shots.title: Config fields, reported_by data, sort bug pattern
shots.notes: Data-only fixes (gitignored .slope/ directory): added missing fields to config.json, added reported_by: [] to all 10 common-issues patterns, added pattern #11 for the sort bug.

nutrition.description: Clean build + typecheck + all 1014 tests pass (780 core + 36 store + 144 CLI + 54 MCP) after each commit
3 focused commits in execution order. Commit-per-fix discipline. Build/test/typecheck before final push.
All existing tests pass unchanged. 12 new tests added (6 loader, 2 builder, 4 pipeline). Zero regressions.

nineteenth_hole.how_did_it_feel: Quick and clean. Classic bugfix sprint — the sort bug was the critical one and had a one-line fix. The pattern of dogfooding revealing small gaps is exactly what SLOPE is designed to surface.
nineteenth_hole.advice_for_next_player: The .slope/ directory is gitignored, so config.json and common-issues.json changes are local-only. Each developer needs to update their own .slope/config.json with the new fields. The loader numeric sort fix means slope review (no args) now correctly finds the latest sprint.
nineteenth_hole.what_surprised_you: Nothing surprising — all fixes were straightforward. The lexicographic sort bug is a classic JavaScript gotcha (pattern #11 now documents it). Good example of why dogfooding matters.
nineteenth_hole.excited_about_next: SLOPE now works correctly on its own repo. Future sprints can rely on slope review, slope card, slope briefing without manual path overrides.

yardage_book_updates: packages/core/src/loader.ts: Numeric sort comparator for scorecard filenames
packages/cli/src/commands/review.ts: Same numeric sort fix for default-latest-scorecard path
packages/core/src/builder.ts: Added player field to ScorecardInput, threaded through buildScorecard
packages/core/src/pipeline.ts: reported_by extraction from cluster events + merge on update
packages/core/tests/loader.test.ts: New file — 6 tests for numeric sort ordering
packages/core/tests/builder.test.ts: 2 new tests for player field passthrough
packages/core/tests/pipeline.test.ts: 4 new tests for reported_by population and merge
course_management_notes: 4 shots, 3 in_the_hole + 1 green — zero hazards, zero penalties, par
Critical fix: sprint-9.json no longer sorts after sprint-20.json
12 new tests. Total test count: 1014 (up from 1002)
